findings.name: Forms without a description
findings.recommendation: Add a short description to each main form.

findings.name: Automations missing a process tag
findings.message: 1 automation is not mapped to a business process.
findings.recommendation: Tag automations with their BPC process code.

findings.name: Web resource flagged for review
findings.recommendation: Confirm the resource is referenced by a form or remove it.

findings.name: Plugin with sparse business-logic notes
findings.recommendation: Document the plugin's purpose and trigger.

findings.name: Option set not bound to a column
findings.message: 1 global option set is not used by any column.
findings.recommendation: Bind it to a column or remove it.
